full_text:
Tao Sheng 陶升
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tao Sheng (陶升)was born in Wei. Bandit leader, he rescued the family of many officials when he took Ye. Yuan Shao rewarded him for it. Tao Sheng was a bandit affiliated with Yuan Shao.
